startPoint.en: Talk to the fallen man inside the small cave in the Lunar Isle Mine.
startPoint.es: Habla con el hombre caído dentro de la pequeña cueva en la Lunar Isle Mine.

items.name: Food
items.display: 3 different kinds of food: 6 of 1 type and 7 of 2 others for a total of 20 pieces.

children.name: Purple sweets
children.display: Purple sweets, roast potatoes, mince pies, yule logs, and mint cakes cannot be used; stackable foods, such as holy biscuits, will be counted as a single piece of food; cake can be used in all 3 pieces.

children.name: Port Sarim
children.display: An easy way to acquire the food items is to use the lodestone teleport to Port Sarim, which brings you right next to the Wydin's Food Store, and then lodestone teleport right back to Lunar Isle.

children.name: Cabbage
children.display: Cabbages, onions, and raw potatoes can be found within Rellekka. To use fewer backpack space, you can fill the vegetables into empty sacks, or alternatively bring uncut pineapples.

recommended.name: Food (bring the highest-healing food for your level)
recommended.display: Food (bring the highest-healing food for your level)

recommended.name: Ring of recoil
recommended.display: A ring of recoil can be useful, especially for players low on food

recommended.name: Lunar spellbook
recommended.display: Being on the Lunar spellbook and having runes for the NPC Contact spell

rewards.display: 15,000 experience lamp in one of: Strength, Ranged, Magic, Constitution, or Defence

rewards.name: Lunar spellbook
rewards.display: 9 new spells added to the Lunar spellbook:

rewards.name: NPC Contact
rewards.display: Access to the 'Random' option on NPC Contact

rewards.name: Down and Out
rewards.display: Down and Out - upon entering the cave with Cyrisus

rewards.name: On the Up
rewards.display: On the Up - during the cutscene when Cyrisus stands up

text.en: Enter the mine in the north-east area of Lunar Isle.
text.es: Entra en la mina de la zona noreste de Lunar Isle.

text.en: Crawl-through the cave entrance (quest minimap icon).
text.es: Arrástrate por la entrada de la cueva (icono de misión en el minimapa).

text.en: Talk to the fallen man (close the interface when it appears).
text.es: Habla con el hombre caído (cierra la interfaz cuando aparezca).

text.en: Starting with one of your 7 item foods, feed him 4 food while cycling through your different foods.
text.es: Empezando por una de las 7 comidas que llevas, dale de comer 4 alimentos alternando entre tus diferentes comidas.

text.en: Starting with a food item of which you brought 7 items will ensure you do not run out of variety.
text.es: Empezar con un alimento del que llevas 7 unidades te asegurará no quedarte sin variedad.

text.en: Talk to him again.
text.es: Habla con él de nuevo.

text.en: Feed him 4 more food as before.
text.es: Dale de comer 4 alimentos más como antes.

text.en: Talk to repeatedly to raise his spirits:
text.es: Habla con él repetidamente para animarlo:

text.en: Of the four chat options, choose the one that appears on the table below.
text.es: De las cuatro opciones de chat, elige la que aparece en la tabla de abajo.

text.en: Select the response according to the table.
text.es: Selecciona la respuesta según la tabla.

text.en: Repeat until a short cutscene plays and he sits up.
text.es: Repite hasta que se reproduzca una breve escena y él se incorpore.

rows.text: You seem like a nice guy.
Just being honest.
When we get out of here I'll buy you a drink!
Whatever and wherever you want - my treat.
I'm very impressed you managed to get into this cave.
I would have given up personally.
You'll survive this easily.
Think of all the places you can visit when you get out!
What are you going to do when you get out of here?
That's up to you. You could travel with me!
It's a good thing you have me to look after you.
Not that I'm bragging or anything.
Not long now and you'll be back on your feet!
On whether you mind me helping you further.
You're sounding much better.
If you need anything, just let me know.
It's quite cosy in here.
The perfect environment for getting back on your feet!
You're very safe in this little cave.
The suqah will never fit through that tunnel.
Just don't worry.
Of course.
You're looking better now.
Well, you look and sound more lively.
Are you looking forward to getting out?
That's the spirit!
Tell me a bit about yourself.
Fishing!

text.en: Feed him 6 more food.
text.es: Dale de comer 6 alimentos más.

text.en: Talk to him and raise his spirit as before until he stands up.
text.es: Habla con él y anímalo como antes hasta que se ponga de pie.

text.en: Exit the cave and climb up the ladder.
text.es: Sal de la cueva y sube por la escalera.

text.en: Or just use the Lunar Isle lodestone
text.es: O simplemente usa la piedra de viaje de Lunar Isle

text.en: Talk to 'Bird's-Eye' Jack in the bank. You will need 1 free inventory space for Cyrisus's chest.
text.es: Habla con 'Bird's-Eye' Jack en el banco. Necesitarás 1 espacio libre en el inventario para el cofre de Cyrisus.

text.en: Select the equipment he needs. The equipment is usually, but not always, dependent on your highest combat stats (Magic, Ranged, Melee):
text.es: Selecciona el equipo que necesita. El equipo suele depender, aunque no siempre, de tus estadísticas de combate más altas (Magia, Distancia, Cuerpo a cuerpo):

text.en: Melee: Dragon helm, Abyssal whip, Ahrim's robe top, Ahrim's robe skirt, Ranger boots
text.es: Cuerpo a cuerpo: Dragon helm, Abyssal whip, Ahrim's robe top, Ahrim's robe skirt, Ranger boots

text.en: Ranged: Splitbark Helm, Karil's top, Torag's platelegs, Adamant boots, Magic shortbow
text.es: Distancia: Splitbark Helm, Karil's top, Torag's platelegs, Adamant boots, Magic shortbow

text.en: Magic: Robin Hood hat, Dragon Chainbody, Black dragonhide chaps, Infinity boots, Ancient staff
text.es: Magia: Robin Hood hat, Dragon Chainbody, Black dragonhide chaps, Infinity boots, Ancient staff

text.en: You can use the NPC Contact spell to ensure you have the right equipment.
text.es: Puedes usar el hechizo NPC Contact para asegurarte de tener el equipo correcto.

text.en: Return and talk to Cyrisus for a cutscene.
text.es: Vuelve y habla con Cyrisus para una escena.

text.en: Right-click "inspect" and fill the remaining stats until he tells you that he is ok (if not already).
text.es: Haz clic derecho en "inspect" y completa las estadísticas restantes hasta que te diga que está bien (si no lo ha hecho ya).

text.en: Talk to the Oneiromancer at the astral altar (most south-eastern part of the Lunar Isle) for a dream vial (herb).
text.es: Habla con el Oneiromancer en el astral altar (la zona más al sureste de Lunar Isle) para conseguir un dream vial (hierba).

text.en: Change your spellbook as necessary if you wish to use magic in the final fight.
text.es: Cambia tu libro de hechizos si es necesario, en caso de que quieras usar magia en el combate final.

text.en: Use an astral rune on an anvil (there's one on Lunar Isle in a small building to the south), then grind the shards. Add it to the potion.
text.es: Usa una astral rune en un yunque (hay uno en Lunar Isle, en un pequeño edificio al sur), y luego muele los fragmentos. Añádelo a la poción.

text.en: Prepare for 4 fights (below level 100). Prayers and emergency teleports won't work. Neither will familiars.
text.es: Prepárate para 4 combates (nivel inferior a 100). Las oraciones y los teletransportes de emergencia no funcionarán. Tampoco los familiares.

text.en: Light the Ceremonial Brazier in the long hall building, near the lodestone.
text.es: Enciende el Ceremonial Brazier en el edificio del long hall, cerca de la piedra de viaje.

text.en: Talk to Cyrisus (dismiss any followers before).
text.es: Habla con Cyrisus (despide antes a tus seguidores).

text.en: Do not click away of the chat or you will be teleported out
text.es: No hagas clic fuera del chat o serás teletransportado fuera

text.en: During the fight, you can leave at any time by using the pedestal.
text.es: Durante el combate, puedes salir en cualquier momento usando el pedestal.

text.en: Kill The Inadequacy
text.es: Mata a The Inadequacy

text.en: Kill The Everlasting (can safespot by the pedestal)
text.es: Mata a The Everlasting (puedes hacer safespot junto al pedestal)

text.en: Kill The Untouchable (can safespot by the pedestal)
text.es: Mata a The Untouchable (puedes hacer safespot junto al pedestal)

text.en: Kill The Illusive
text.es: Mata a The Illusive

text.en: Return to the Oneiromancer.
text.es: Regresa con el Oneiromancer.

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
